title: Demo video script and README polish
objective: Prepare a concise demo script and polish the README so the project can be understood by recruiters, collaborators, and future implementation agents.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Create docs/DEMO_VIDEO_SCRIPT.md with a 3–5 minute demo narrative and exact command sequence.
Polish README with quick start, architecture summary, implementation status, and roadmap.
Add a recruiter-friendly project summary and a developer-friendly implementation guide.
Add a realistic limitations section that distinguishes starter, MVP, beta, and full harness.
Ensure AGENT_TASK_INDEX.md and backlog.yml remain consistent.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 데모 영상 대본과 최종 README를 다듬는다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
